hints.text: All coverage is **'shitcam'** — a dimmer, hazier variant than India/Nigeria; car usually fully blurred (big back blur) w/ a slanted **antenna** poking from the side
**Portuguese** language; Portuguese-style ladder poles & pedestrian signs
Tropical islands **almost entirely rainforest**; banana plants everywhere
Some wooden poles **painted blue at the bottom** w/ the letters **CST**
**Príncipe** car = blue roof + silver rails (dimmer shitcam); **São Tomé** car = black w/ black rails; oil-palm plantations in the south
